channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports

item.title: Source: Astros have offer in place for Alex Bregman
item.description: Bregman is the top free agent third baseman on the market, and is coming off winning his first Gold Glove award while hitting .260 with 26 home runs and 75 RBI, with an OPS+ of 118 in the final season of a 5-year, $100 million extension with the Astros.
item.dc:creator: Ari Alexander, KPRC 2

item.title: Eric Bieniemy, once highly sought-after NFL head coaching prospect, out at UCLA as offensive coordinator
item.description: UCLA offensive coordinator Eric Bieniemy parted ways with the school after one year on the job as he hopes to return to the NFL as a coach again.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Amber Glenn takes the lead in Grand Prix Final figure skating after Kaori Sakamoto falls
item.description: GRENOBLE, France (AP) — Competing with five Japanese skaters in the six-woman field, Amber Glenn of the United States continued her breakout season in figure skating by taking the lead in the short program at the Grand Prix Final on Thursday as world champion Kaori Sakamoto fell.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, PHL 17

item.title: White Sox great 'Beltin'' Bill Melton dead at 79
item.description: The Chicago White Sox announced that Bill Melton, a former All-Star third baseman who played eight of his 10 MLB seasons with them, died from a brief illness at 79 years old.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Jack Eichel says Team USA seeks to prove it has closed the gap on Canada at 4 Nations Face-Off
item.description: It didn’t take much to stir Jack Eichel’s national pride in looking ahead to representing the United States at the 4 Nations Face-Off tournament. Appearing on a Team USA Zoom call on Thursday, the Vegas Golden Knights forward jumped right in when reminded how U.S.
item.dc:creator: JOHN WAWROW, Associated Press, PHL 17

item.title: Total number of Texas fans caught and punished for throwing bottles in Georgia game: Zero
item.description: AUSTIN, Texas (AP) — The University of Texas investigation into the bottle-throwing incident that disrupted the Texas-Georgia game in October — and drew a harsh rebuke and fine from the Southeastern Conference — resulted in no one being caught or punished.
item.dc:creator: JIM VERTUNO, Associated Press, PIX 11

item.title: All-Star pitcher Luis Severino lands historic deal with A's: reports
item.description: The A's are relocating from Oakland to Sacramento before potentially moving to Las Vegas. But that didn't stop A's brass from making a big splash in free agency.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Bears interim head coach has lost over 20 pounds amid team's coaching staff changes
item.description: Chicago Bears interim head coach Thomas Brown received two promotions due to firings last month, and the added responsibilities have helped him lose 22 pounds.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Olympics leader Bach talks up working with President-elect Trump toward 2028 Los Angeles Games
item.description: GENEVA (AP) — Olympic leaders are “very confident and relaxed” about working with the incoming Trump administration ahead of the 2028 Los Angeles Summer Games, outgoing IOC president Thomas Bach said Thursday. U.S.
item.dc:creator: GRAHAM DUNBAR, Associated Press, PHL 17

item.title: Steelers' George Pickens needs to 'calm down,' NFL legend says amid the star wide receiver's on-field antics
item.description: NFL legend Steve Smith says Pittsburgh Steelers wide receiver George Pickens needs to "calm down," addressing the stars recent on-field antics.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: The A's are expected to clear the last major hurdle for a $1.75 billion Las Vegas stadium Thursday
item.description: LAS VEGAS (AP) — The Las Vegas Stadium Authority is expected to approve a 30-year lease, non-relocation and development documents Thursday to clear the last major hurdles for the Athletics to construct a stadium on the Strip and bring Major League Baseball to the expanding sports market.
item.dc:creator: MARK ANDERSON, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: The A's are expected to clear the last major hurdle for a $1.75 billion Las Vegas stadium Thursday
item.description: The Las Vegas Stadium Authority is expected to approve the 30-year lease, non-relocation and development documents Thursday to clear the last major hurdles for the Athletics to construct a stadium on the Strip and bring Major League Baseball to the expanding sports market.
item.dc:creator: Mark Anderson, Associated Press, KPRC 2

item.title: Luis Severino and Athletics agree to $67 million, 3-year contract, AP sources say
item.description: Two people familiar with the negotiations tell The Associated Press that right-hander Luis Severino and the Athletics have agreed to a $67 million, three-year contract.
item.dc:creator: Janie Mccauley, Associated Press, Local 4

item.title: Aaron Rodgers says it 'ridiculous' to believe he has more to prove, still hopes to return to Jets next year
item.description: While Aaron Rodgers remains interested in a future with the Jets, it is unclear if the franchise has mutual feelings about the relationship continuing in 2025.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Manny Pacquiao, winner of titles in a record 8 weight classes, elected to Boxing Hall of Fame
item.description: Manny Pacquiao, who won titles in a record eight weight classes from flyweight to super welterweight while becoming one of boxing's biggest draws, was elected Thursday to the International Boxing Hall of Fame.
item.dc:creator: BRIAN MAHONEY, Associated Press, PIX 11

item.title: Toronto WNBA franchise reveals name, set to compete in 2026
item.description: The WNBA announced the name and logo of their Toronto franchise, the 14th team in the WNBA, which will tip off for the first time in 2026.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Former White Sox player, analyst Bill Melton dies at 79
item.description: CHICAGO — "Beltin'" Bill Melton has died at the age of 79. According to CHSN's Chuck Garfien, Melton died overnight in Arizona after recently dealing with some health issues. Debuting with the White sox in 1968, Melton was the 1971 AL home run leader and made the All-Star team that year.
item.dc:creator: Andy Koval, WGN 9

item.title: Falcons legend discusses how Atlanta can overcome latest skid, Kirk Cousins' return to Minnesota
item.description: The Atlanta Falcons can get out of this three-game losing streak against the Minnesota Vikings, who Kirk Cousins spent six seasons with.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Brett Favre says America should take back farm land from China after Trump's victory
item.description: NFL legend Brett Favre suggested the U.S. should be actively taking back its farmland that has been purchased by China in a post on X a month after President-elect Donald Trump's win.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Utes bring in 21 players on early signing day
item.description: SALT LAKE CITY (ABC4 Sports) - With the future of head coach Kyle Whittingham still up in the air, and the search for a new offensive coordinator ongoing, the Utes football program inked 19 new players on National Signing Day Wednesday.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4
